description: Declares the common layer contract: which agents and skills are provided by templates/common/, their versions, and override governance rules. Variants inherit these via new-project.sh and may declare overrides in their variant.json.

governance.anti_swelling_note: If >= 50% of variants override the same agent, the common definition should be updated instead

override_types.additive: Variant adds sections to common content. Auto-approved. Scaffolding: concatenate common + partial.
override_types.replacement: Variant modifies common content. Requires lifecycle-manager review. Scaffolding: variant file replaces common.

pm.description: Project Manager — orchestrates phases 0, 2, 6; universal across all variants
skeleton_sections: YOU ARE THE SINGLE ENTRY POINT

project-review.description: Comprehensive parallel project review — universal across all variants

script-lifecycle-manager.description: Script lifecycle management — tracks script health and deprecation

validate-docs-links.description: Validates documentation cross-references and link integrity

commit-push-pr.description: Redirects commit+push+PR requests to /sync pipeline — enforces CHANGELOG, memlog, and audit gates

finishing-a-development-branch.description: Workspace override — redirects branch completion to /sync pipeline

platform-skill-lifecycle-manager.description: Platform skill lifecycle management for .claude/skills/ and .gemini/skills/

platform-command-lifecycle-manager.description: Platform command lifecycle management for .claude/commands/ and .gemini/commands/

simulate-project-creation.description: Tests new-project scaffolding logic in a temporary directory

platform_settings.description: Classifies .claude/settings.json and .gemini/settings.json keys into tiers. SSOT for platform settings parity governance. Tier definitions: shared=required in both, claude_only=Claude Code exclusive (absent from .gemini is correct), gemini_only=Antigravity exclusive (absent from .claude is correct).

shared.description: Settings that both Claude Code and Antigravity support with the same intent. Must be present in both .claude/settings.json and .gemini/settings.json.

mcpServers.description: MCP server definitions — both platforms support MCP

hooks.SessionStart.description: Session start hook — both platforms support SessionStart

hooks.PostToolUse.description: Post-tool-use hook — both platforms support PostToolUse

claude_only.description: Settings exclusive to Claude Code. Antigravity does not support these. Absent from .gemini/settings.json is CORRECT behavior, not a parity violation.

permissions.description: Claude Code permission allowlist (allow/deny tool patterns)
permissions.reason_excluded: Antigravity uses a different permission model

env.description: Environment variables injected into Claude Code session
env.reason_excluded: Antigravity env injection uses different mechanism

teammateMode.reason_excluded: Agent Teams is Claude Code-only; Antigravity uses Agent Manager UI

hooks.TeammateIdle.description: Fires when a Claude Code Agent Teams teammate becomes idle
hooks.TeammateIdle.reason_excluded: TeammateIdle event does not exist in Antigravity

hooks.TaskCreated.description: Fires when an Agent Teams task is created
hooks.TaskCreated.reason_excluded: TaskCreated event does not exist in Antigravity

hooks.TaskCompleted.description: Fires when an Agent Teams task is marked complete
hooks.TaskCompleted.reason_excluded: TaskCompleted event does not exist in Antigravity

gemini_only.description: Settings exclusive to Antigravity CLI. Claude Code does not support these. Absent from .claude/settings.json is CORRECT behavior, not a parity violation.
